title: Multi-class Probabilistic Active Learning (McPAL)
text_0: **Idea:** McPAL scores each unlabeled sample by the density-weighted expected gain in a target performance metric (e.g., accuracy), integrating a sample's impact, its class posterior, and the posterior's reliability via a closed-form expectation over all possible labelings. This yields a non-myopic selector for multi-class problems. Its effectiveness hinges on calibrated posteriors and sensible density estimates.
